title: Bridgeport, CT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bridgeport, CT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bridgeport is a city in CT with a population of 148,654. Connecticut’s largest city with affordable housing by Northeast standards and train to NYC.
